name: Board of Police Commissioners Meeting - November 20, 2025
description:
The Detroit Board of Police Commissioners has scheduled a meeting for Thursday, November 20, 2025 at 3:00 p.m., at Detroit Public Safety Headquarters - Skylar Herbert Room, 1301 Third St, Detroit, MI, 48226.

 

Presenter/Topic:

DPD HR Report (Oct)

 

With advance notice of seven calendar days, the City of Detroit will provide interpreter services at public meetings, including language translation and reasonable ADA accommodations. Please contact the Civil Rights, Inclusion, and Opportunity Department at (313) 224-4950,  TTY number 711, or crio@detroitmi.gov to schedule these services.

name: Board of Water Commissioners November 2025 Committee Meetings
description:
The Detroit Board of Water Commissioners will have its November 2025 Committee Meetings on Wednesday, November 5, 2025 at 1:00 p.m. virtually. The public may participate in public comment, view the meeting on Zoom, or watch live on YouTube.

View the presentations and other meeting documents here. If you made a comment during this meeting, please share your contact information here.

 

 

Detroit Board of Water Commissioners
November 2025 Committee Meetings
Wednesday, November 5, 2025
1:00 p.m.

 

Attend Meeting Virtually

To attend online:  https://cityofdetroit.zoom.us/j/81572635118

Use Passcode: 482262021

 

Attend by phone: call one of these numbers:

+1-301-715-8592

+1-312-626-6799

+1-267-831-0333

 

Use Meeting ID: 815 7263 5118

Use Passcode: 482262021

 

 

 

Request for Public Comment on Wednesday, November 5, 2025:

 

Attending via Zoom for BOWC Committees

During the public comment section, raise your hand using the Zoom hand icon on your desktop or mobile device, or if calling into the meeting by phone, press *9 to raise your hand (press *6 to unmute when called upon).
We respectfully request that you maximize your three minutes by sharing all your comments/ questions at one time.
Please complete this online form to share your contact information in order for DWSD staff to follow up with you.
You will only be called upon once for public comment during each committee.
Once the committee chair closes public comment, there will be no other comments from the public accepted and all attendees will remain muted for the duration of the meeting.

 

NOTE:  The BOWC committees are not a quorum of the full body of the commission and do not take any final voting action; therefore the committees are virtual as they do not need to adhere to the Open Meetings Act for in-person access. They discuss items and recommend them to the full body.

name: Board of Water Commissioners December 2025 Meeting
description:
The Detroit Board of Water Commissioners will have its December 2025 monthly meeting on Wednesday, December 17, 2025 at 2 p.m. at the Water Board Building. The public may also view the meeting through Zoom or watch live on YouTube..

View the presentations and other meeting documents here. If you made a comment during this meeting, please share your contact information here.

 

 

Detroit Board of Water Commissioners
December 2025 Meeting
Wednesday, December 17, 2025
2:00 p.m.
735 Randolph Ave., Detroit, MI 48226.

 

 

Attend Meeting Virtually

To attend online:  https://cityofdetroit.zoom.us/j/81572635118

Use Passcode: 482262021

 

Attend by phone: call one of these numbers:

+1-301-715-8592

+1-312-626-6799

+1-267-831-0333

 

Use Meeting ID: 815 7263 5118

Use Passcode: 482262021

 

 

 

Request for Public Comment on December 17, 2025

You may provide your public comment in-person or via Zoom (see below).

 

In-person attendees for BOWC Regular Meeting

Upon entering the Water Board Building, DWSD Security will ask for your ID and sign you in before directing you to the Board Room.  
If you want to make public comment, complete the form available in the Board Room and it will be provided to the Chair. The Chair will call on you during the appropriate time.
We respectfully request that you maximize your three minutes by sharing all your comments/questions at one time.
You will only be called upon once for public comment.
Once the chair closes public comment, there will be no other comments from the public accepted and all public attendees will not be acknowledged during the remainder of the meeting.

 

Attending via Zoom for BOWC Regular Meeting

During the public comment section, raise your hand using the Zoom hand icon on your desktop or mobile device, or if calling into the meeting by phone, press *9 to raise your hand (press *6 to unmute when called upon).
We respectfully request that you maximize your three minutes by sharing all your comments/ questions at one time.
You will only be called upon once for public comment.
Once the chair closes public comment, there will be no other comments from the public accepted and all attendees will remain muted for the duration of the meeting.
Please complete this online form to share your contact information in order for DWSD staff to follow up with you.

 

With advance notice of seven calendar days, the City of Detroit will provide interpreter services at public meetings, including language translation and reasonable ADA accommodations.  Please contact the Water and Sewerage Department Board of Water Commissioners at (313) 224-4704, or email dwsd-publicaffairs@detroitmi.gov to schedule these services.

name: Board of Water Commissioners November 2025 Meeting
description:
The Detroit Board of Water Commissioners will have its November 2025 monthly meeting on Wednesday, November 19, 2025 at 2 p.m. at the Water Board Building. The public may also view the meeting through Zoom or watch live on YouTube..

View the presentations and other meeting documents here. If you made a comment during this meeting, please share your contact information here.

 

 

Detroit Board of Water Commissioners
November 2025 Meeting
Wednesday, November 19, 2025
2:00 p.m.
735 Randolph Ave., Detroit, MI 48226.

 

 

Attend Meeting Virtually

To attend online:  https://cityofdetroit.zoom.us/j/81572635118

Use Passcode: 482262021

 

Attend by phone: call one of these numbers:

+1-301-715-8592

+1-312-626-6799

+1-267-831-0333

 

Use Meeting ID: 815 7263 5118

Use Passcode: 482262021

 

 

 

Request for Public Comment on November 19, 2025

You may provide your public comment in-person or via Zoom (see below).

 

In-person attendees for BOWC Regular Meeting

Upon entering the Water Board Building, DWSD Security will ask for your ID and sign you in before directing you to the Board Room.  
If you want to make public comment, complete the form available in the Board Room and it will be provided to the Chair. The Chair will call on you during the appropriate time.
We respectfully request that you maximize your three minutes by sharing all your comments/questions at one time.
You will only be called upon once for public comment.
Once the chair closes public comment, there will be no other comments from the public accepted and all public attendees will not be acknowledged during the remainder of the meeting.

 

Attending via Zoom for BOWC Regular Meeting

During the public comment section, raise your hand using the Zoom hand icon on your desktop or mobile device, or if calling into the meeting by phone, press *9 to raise your hand (press *6 to unmute when called upon).
We respectfully request that you maximize your three minutes by sharing all your comments/ questions at one time.
You will only be called upon once for public comment.
Once the chair closes public comment, there will be no other comments from the public accepted and all attendees will remain muted for the duration of the meeting.
Please complete this online form to share your contact information in order for DWSD staff to follow up with you.

 

With advance notice of seven calendar days, the City of Detroit will provide interpreter services at public meetings, including language translation and reasonable ADA accommodations.  Please contact the Water and Sewerage Department Board of Water Commissioners at (313) 224-4704, or email dwsd-publicaffairs@detroitmi.gov to schedule these services.

extras.cityscrapers.org/address: 735 Randolph Street, First Floor Detroit, MI 48226 Monday - Friday, 8:00 am - 5:00 pm

name: Board of Water Commissioners January 2026 Committee Meetings
description:
The Detroit Board of Water Commissioners will have its January 2026 Committee Meetings on Wednesday, January 7, 2026 at 1:00 p.m. virtually. The public may participate in public comment, view the meeting on Zoom, or watch live on YouTube.

View the presentations and other meeting documents here. If you made a comment during this meeting, please share your contact information here.

 

 

Detroit Board of Water Commissioners
January 2026 Committee Meetings
Wednesday, January 7, 2026
1:00 p.m.

 

Attend Meeting Virtually

To attend online:  https://cityofdetroit.zoom.us/j/81572635118

Use Passcode: 482262021

 

Attend by phone: call one of these numbers:

+1-301-715-8592

+1-312-626-6799

+1-267-831-0333

 

Use Meeting ID: 815 7263 5118

Use Passcode: 482262021

 

 

 

Request for Public Comment on Wednesday, January 7, 2026:

 

Attending via Zoom for BOWC Committees

During the public comment section, raise your hand using the Zoom hand icon on your desktop or mobile device, or if calling into the meeting by phone, press *9 to raise your hand (press *6 to unmute when called upon).
We respectfully request that you maximize your three minutes by sharing all your comments/ questions at one time.
Please complete this online form to share your contact information in order for DWSD staff to follow up with you.
You will only be called upon once for public comment during each committee.
Once the committee chair closes public comment, there will be no other comments from the public accepted and all attendees will remain muted for the duration of the meeting.

 

NOTE:  The BOWC committees are not a quorum of the full body of the commission and do not take any final voting action; therefore the committees are virtual as they do not need to adhere to the Open Meetings Act for in-person access. They discuss items and recommend them to the full body.
